title: Not here to sell dreams — just offering transparency.
author: Lumpy_Delay_7955
selftext:
I’ve been running a copy trading account and I’m opening a few spots for people who are interested.

How it works:

You copy my trades automatically on your own account. You keep full control of your funds at all times.

What makes this different:

\- You keep your capital (no money sent to me)

\- You can stop anytime

\- Full transparency — I provide investor password access

\- Real-time performance tracking

\- Verified history directly on the account (no screenshots)

\- Strict risk management

To be clear:

\- Trading involves risk

\- No guaranteed returns

\- Looking for serious long-term people only

If you want to see the performance live, send me a DM.

I’ll share investor access so you can verify everything yourself.

No pressure — just transparency.
